+[  Left Group  ]--------------------------+
|                                          |   +[  Right Group  ]---------------------+
|                           +----------+   |   |                                      |
|                   +------>|  Node B  +---o---o-----------------+                    |
| +----------+      |       +----------+   |   |                 |      +----------+  |
| |  Node A  +------+                      |   |                 +----->|  Node D  |  |
| +----------+      |                      |   |  +----------+   |      +----------+  |
|                   +----------------------o---o->|  Node C  +---+                    |
|                                          |   |  +----------+                        |
|                                          |   |                                      |
|                                          |   |                                      |
|                                          |   +--------------------------------------+
+------------------------------------------+
